heading: Learn by Watching
body:
You can also watch the following videos to
learn more about MongoDB Search operators and collectors:Watch this video for an overview of searching and tracking your
queries with MongoDB Search. In this video, you can learn more about MongoDB Search
[operators](fts-operators) and how MongoDB Search [relevance scoring](scoring-ref) documents in the results.*Duration: 15 Minutes*[https://youtu.be/U-hAo_TAi9c](https://youtu.be/U-hAo_TAi9c)Follow along with this video to learn how to search fields in embedded
documents using the [embeddedDocument](embedded-document-ref) operator, how to
perform fuzzy search using the [text](text-ref) operator [fuzzy option](text-ref-fields), how to build search-as-you-type function
using the [autocomplete](autocomplete-ref) operator, how to run geospatial
queries using the [geoWithin](geowithin-ref) and [geoShape](geoshape-ref)
operators, how to retrieve similar or alternate results using the
[autocomplete](more-like-this-ref) operator, and how to display
search terms in their original context using [highlights](highlight-ref).*Duration: 12 Minutes*[https://youtu.be/Ibdb81WXOxE](https://youtu.be/Ibdb81WXOxE)
